justification: The question concerns the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of corporate debt securities, which is a standard metric used to analyze risk and valuation in fixed-income financial markets.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread of securities with an investment grade rating of A in the ICE BofA US Corporate Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt issued in the US domestic market, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?
